lines.speaker: Tiles
lines.text: Hello. Do you wish me to exchange banknotes for you? I charge only 5 coins for each banknote.

lines.speaker: Tiles
lines.text: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.

lines.speaker: Tiles
lines.text: I am Tiles. I can exchange banknotes for real items. Do you want any banknotes converted?
